# moveIn

**Type Property**

The layer’s content slides into place over any existing content.

## Declaration

```swift
static let moveIn: CATransitionType
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.quartzcore/documentation/QuartzCore/common-transition-subtypes] are used with this transition.

## Constants

- **fade**: The layer’s content fades as it becomes visible or hidden.
- **push**: The layer’s content pushes any existing content as it slides into place.
- **reveal**: The layer’s content is revealed gradually in the direction specified by the transition subtype.
